name: @gnoviawan/pi-biome-lsp
description: Biome lint/format/check integration for Pi, including daemon startup and post-edit checks.
readme:
# @gnoviawan/pi-biome-lsp

Biome lint/format/check integration for Pi, including daemon startup and post-edit checks.

This package is part of the `pi-template` monorepo and is installable as a Pi package.
